_schema_note: SAFE breaker schema. The AGGRESSIVE breaker (automation/state/aggressive/circuit-breaker.json) uses a fully divergent vocabulary (C9 symmetry trap). Field-name mapping SAFE -> AGGRESSIVE: tripped->tripped (SAME, both present); tripped_reason->trip_reason; tripped_at->tripped_at_et; starting_equity_today->equity_start_of_day; current_equity->equity_current; daily_loss_limit_dollars/_pct->loss_pct (aggressive stores realized loss %, not the limit). Today each heartbeat reads ONLY its own breaker and mostly only `.tripped` (present in both), so nothing breaks — but any CROSS-ACCOUNT consumer must use this mapping or it will read null on the other file. Do NOT rename the live keys here (the safe heartbeat gate reads them). See aggressive file's _note for the unresolved -60% (aggressive loss_pct) vs Rule-5 Bold=-50% threshold drift, pending J ruling.
